scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w @yayanews/web" "npm run dev -w @yayanews/admin" "npm run dev -w @yayanews/ws-server" "npm run dev -w @yayanews/pipeline"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @yayanews/ws-server && npm run build -w @yayanews/web && npm run build -w @yayanews/admin && node infra/scripts/copy-standalone.mjs
